name: codex-autoresearch
description: Auto Research for Codex. Run a structured autonomous iteration loop with a standing subagent pool, runtime controls, and specialized workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Cross-platform autonomous iteration for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Bundle root Auto Research skills, references, and helper scripts into a Codex-installable plugin while preserving compatibility with the existing Claude command surface.
defaultPrompt: Use $codex-autoresearch to set up and run Auto Research on this repository.
Use $codex-autoresearch to plan a foreground or background improvement loop for this codebase.
